overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The player moves from a covered graffiti-lined arcade through an open commercial district with holographic advertisements, neon-lit buildings, and wet reflective pavement, ending at a pedestrian crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with graffiti art

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered arcade into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway with graffiti-covered floor toward the plaza exit

notable_agents.action: person in camouflage jacket standing near a makeshift camp against the wall
person interacting with a glowing vending machine

entered.detail: curved concrete roof structure covering the walkway
large architectural archway marking the transition to the plaza
colorful spray-painted artwork covering the concrete floor
illuminated beverage vending machine with digital display
large wall with white dragon mural and partial 'CO.' text

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian arcade with a curved concrete roof. The floor is covered in colorful graffiti art. To the left, a person stands near a makeshift camp against a wall featuring a large white dragon mural. To the right, another person uses an illuminated vending machine. The camera walks forward toward a large archway leading to an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza with holographic advertising kiosk

events.description: exits the covered arcade into the semi-open plaza area
approaching the central holographic advertising structure with yellow base

agents.ego_description: walking toward the central plaza structure featuring large holographic displays

notable_agents.action: woman in red skirt and blue jacket walking ahead toward the plaza center

entered.detail: large central structure with yellow base and glowing green holographic displays
monumental orange staircase ramp leading to upper level
tall structure with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered arcade, the scene opens into a semi-covered plaza. A large holographic advertising kiosk with a yellow base and green glowing displays dominates the center. To the left, a monumental orange staircase structure becomes visible. The concrete archway from the previous segment recedes to the left as the camera advances toward the plaza center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with monumental staircase and corporate signage

events.description: entering fully open plaza with visible night sky and wet reflective pavement
passing the orange staircase structure, Hacienda building becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: walking past the holographic kiosk and orange stairs toward the open plaza

entered.detail: large building with prominent red neon 'Hacienda' signage on the roof
reflective wet tile surface mirroring the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens fully to the night sky with wet reflective pavement mirroring the neon lights. The camera passes the holographic kiosk and approaches the monumental orange staircase. The Hacienda building with its distinctive red neon signage becomes visible on the left. The environment transitions from semi-covered to completely open urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with cinema and retail buildings

events.description: entering the main plaza area with multiple commercial buildings and digital billboards
approaching the pedestrian crosswalk at the edge of the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza with reflective wet pavement toward the street crossing

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the plaza toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: vertical neon sign reading 'BOHEMIA' in red letters on building facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the pavement
tall modern street lamps with blue neon accents

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the commercial plaza, the Hacienda building remains prominent on the left while the Bohemia cinema sign becomes visible further left. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the plaza. The camera approaches a pedestrian crosswalk marked with yellow stripes at the plaza's edge.

events.description: pedestrian passes close to camera on the right, briefly obstructing view

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the pedestrian crosswalk at the street intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in shorts and jacket waiting at the crosswalk edge
person with red hair passing close to the camera

entered.detail: tall traffic signal with multiple lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the street intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. The Bohemia cinema sign is now close on the left. Several pedestrians are waiting or crossing the street. A person passes very close to the camera on the right, briefly causing an occlusion. The scene ends at the crosswalk with the Hacienda building visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, graffiti-strewn arcade into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza at night. It begins under a curved concrete roof, passing a white dragon mural and an illuminated vending machine while moving toward a large archway. As the camera exits the arcade, the space opens into a semi-covered plaza dominated by a glowing green holographic kiosk and a monumental orange staircase. The scene then expands fully under the night sky, where wet reflective pavement mirrors the red neon signage of the Hacienda building and the Bohemia cinema sign. Finally, the camera advances through the scattered pedestrians of the commercial district, passing a close bystander before arriving at a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at the street intersection.
